creator: seth@daft.us
text:
I've experienced what appears to be the same panic using both rtorrent
and ctorrent.  Both are from ports I believe.  We're running
6.2-Stable.

It sounds like deluge causes the panic almost immediately, but with
rtorrent it can take minutes to hours.  However, the more connections
that are made, the faster the panic occurs.  For example, actively
seeding 1 torrent can be 3-4 hours, actively seeding 5 torrents will
panic in about 20 minutes.
